resources.string: Signed out — please sign in again
Delete category %1$s? Bookmarks in it will be moved to the default category.
Waiting for category sync before saving.
Delete the downloaded media for this video from this device? Sync can download it again if it remains in retention.
Log out of Igloo on this device? You can sign in again later.
This unfollows the account on the server, removes it from your followed list, and its synced videos can be pruned on Android.
Unfollow \"%1$s\" and delete local media? This cannot be undone.
No posts yet — pull to refresh
This hides their posts from your feed. You can undo it later in Muted accounts.
Open thread with %1$d posts across %2$d people
Follow queued. Will sync when the server is reachable.
Add new items, keep existing data
How should existing data be handled?
Clear existing data, then restore from file
No users are configured. Open setup to create the first admin.
Can\'t reach server — check the URL
Sign in to access the desktop dashboard.
No log entries match this filter.
No activity yet — waiting for first feed cycle
Shown while Igloo catches up downloads in the background
Shown while Igloo is downloading offline media
No results — press Enter to search YouTube
Ranks posts by interest and affinity. When off, posts are shown chronologically.
Please use a dedicated folder. Daily backups include the database and non-secret config. Bookmarked media can be included separately. Keep count is limited to 1-5.
Include bookmarked media in automatic backups
All muted accounts will be unmuted, and their posts can appear in your feed again.
Upload Netscape-format cookie files for platforms that require authentication.
Community-voted titles and thumbnails for YouTube videos. Off, Community, or Casual.
Replace YouTube titles and thumbnails with community-voted alternatives from
Posts in these languages won\'t be auto-translated. Empty list translates everything except your target language.
Leave blank for Google Basic or DeepL defaults. OpenAI-compatible defaults to local Ollama at http://127.0.0.1:11434.
Muted accounts are hidden from the feed. Mute from the post menu on retweets.
Keep items newer than N days; older items are pruned and not re-downloaded. Bookmarked and liked content is never pruned.
Use embed-friendly sites for sharing links
Type a language or code, e.g. Turkish or tr
Skip segments in YouTube videos using community data.
Pulls new feed rows, mutations, and the media mirror from your server. Wi-Fi only avoids metered data; intervals apply to periodic catch-up.
Defaults to English. Options are drawn from your \"Don\'t auto-translate\" list below.
Translations are loaded from the local Weblate catalog.
Their posts can appear in your feed again after sync catches up.
Could not create the admin user.
Choose the platforms this instance should fetch from. You can change user access later.
Create the admin account for this Igloo instance.
Numbers match sidebar position. Pages vary by account.
Paste any video URL (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) to subscribe to that channel
Unfollow queued. Will sync when the server is reachable.
Delete user %1$s? All their data will be removed.
Enter a query to search YouTube.
